enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vannam Konda Vennilave expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the beauty of romantic emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sigaram, the song plays a pivotal role in showcasing the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, known for his soulful voice.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vannam Konda Vennilave was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This beautiful song was released in 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vannam Konda Vennilave, the listener is enveloped in a world of romance and nostalgia, perfectly encapsulated by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful rendition. The song serves as a backdrop to the emotional journey of the characters in Sigaram, highlighting their deep connection and longing for each other. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of yearning and love. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vannam Konda Vennilave is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of Sigaram as it takes you on a heartfelt journey through love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Will the colorful moon come down from the sky? (2)
There is no path in the sky, there is no way to touch you. (2)
Will the colorful moon come down from the sky? (2)
You are not nearby, there is no excitement in the view, there is no language in the self, there is no desire to breathe. (2)
There is no knowledge to say when the wind comes. If you separate the sky, there is nothing in the sky.
If you keep pushing away, there is no life to talk about.
Will the colorful moon come down from the sky? Will the colorful moon come down?
I offered a star flower for your curls, but the star did not come to join. (2)
I will wait to see you, I will wait to touch your feet, until life comes, I will lie down like a body.
If the goddess comes and joins, I will walk with my soul.
Will the colorful moon come down from the sky? There is no path in the sky, there is no way to touch you. (2)
Will the colorful moon come down from the sky? Will the colorful moon come down?
